title: 2-2 Small suppliers - Canada.ca
content:
This memorandum explains who is a small supplier for purposes of the Goods and Services Tax (GST)/Harmonized Sales Tax (HST), the calculation of the small supplier threshold, and when a person will cease to be a small supplier.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format 2-2-e.html

### Read the publication
- Online format 2-2-e.html
- GST31 Application by a Public Service Body to Have Branches or Divisions Designated as Eligible Small Supplier Divisions

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
